config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that can be used to excuse abuse, censorship, and unfair treatment of minorities. A healthy society protects individual rights first, while still allowing limited restrictions when there is a clear public harm. From my perspective, collective goals matter, but they should not erase personal dignity and freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyensoran, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu seharusnya menjadi batas utama, bukan pengorbanan pertama, meski saya mengakui ada situasi tertentu seperti keselamatan publik yang memang memerlukan pembatasan yang sempit dan jelas. Tanpa perlindungan kuat bagi minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer, “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa berubah menjadi tirani mayoritas. Jadi, bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menuntut hak pribadi dikorbankan, melainkan yang mampu menyeimbangkan kebebasan individu dengan tanggung jawab bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because in practice that often becomes a shortcut for abusing power. From my perspective as someone from Indonesia, I understand the appeal of collective harmony and mutual responsibility, but I have also seen how easy it is for “the common good” to be used to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or excuse unfair treatment. Society is strongest when it protects individual dignity and only limits rights in narrow, clearly justified cases like real public safety.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa sering “kepentingan masyarakat” dipakai untuk menekan kebebasan berbicara, hak minoritas, dan warga yang tidak populer. Kekhawatiran tentang penyalahgunaan kekuasaan jauh lebih besar bagi saya daripada janji harmoni kolektif, jadi hak individu harus menjadi dasar utama, bukan sesuatu yang mudah dikorbankan. Masyarakat memang boleh membatasi hak dalam kasus yang benar-benar sempit dan jelas, seperti ancaman keselamatan publik, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sangat ketat dan tidak boleh jadi alasan untuk tirani mayoritas. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menempatkan individu di bawah kolektif, melainkan yang melindungi martabat pribadi sambil tetap menjaga tanggung jawab bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should take priority over individual rights as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony, order, and gotong royong, but I also know how easily “for the common good” can become a cover for silencing criticism or mistreating people who are different. Society is healthier when individual rights are the boundary that power cannot cross, with only narrow exceptions for real and clearly defined public harm.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya cenderung sangat curiga ketika “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, penindasan minoritas, atau perluasan kekuasaan negara, karena di praktiknya itu sering merugikan orang yang paling rentan. Tentu ada pengecualian yang sah, seperti keselamatan publik atau keadaan darurat, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang menelan hak pribadi, melainkan yang melindungi hak individu sambil menuntut tanggung jawab bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
